docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORIOKA, FUTOSHI AS TO DEFENDANT MONTGOMERY, JACKIE AN INDIVIDUAL DBA MONTGOMERY TILE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
